I've placed three Senior SMs this quarter. The ones who stick? They don't "facilitate." They unblock. They tell the PO their backlog is garbage. They call out the VP when sprint goals become wishlists. They make Agile mean something again.

This role in HCMC? The team is sharp. The product has real users. The salary? You'll love it. But they need someone who'll fight for flow, not just run standups.

If you've ever wanted to quit because leadership treated Scrum as theater — this is your exit.

title: Lead Multimedia Designer - Mobile Games
tags: Design,Software and IT Services,Motion Graphics,Leadership,Graphic Design,Adobe After Effects,Adobe Photoshop,Artificial Intelligence (AI),Project Management,Team Management
description: We operate a portfolio of music games reaching hundreds of millions of users worldwide. The Marketing Creative team produces high-volume creative for paid User Acquisition across platforms like Mintegral, Applovin, Unity Ads, and TikTok — with formats spanning video ads, playable ads, banner/static, and store assets.As Lead Multimedia Designer, you will play a key role in shaping how the Marketing Creative team turns ideas into high-quality output at speed.This role sits at the center of creative execution, production operations, and cross-functional collaboration.You will lead a team of around 20+ Designers and Account members, working closely with the Creative Manager and partner teams to turn priorities into clear plans, keep production moving smoothly, and continuously improve how the team delivers.This is a strong fit for someone who can bring structure, clarity, and momentum to a fast-moving creative environment, while helping the team scale quality output over time.
